name: obsidian-simplemind-preview

scripts.install-plugin: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; test -n "$OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH" && mkdir -p "$OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH/.obsidian/plugins/simplemind-preview/assets" && cp dist/main.js "$OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH/.obsidian/plugins/simplemind-preview/main.js" && cp manifest.json styles.css "$OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH/.obsidian/plugins/simplemind-preview/" && cp assets/template-mindmap.smmx "$OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH/.obsidian/plugins/simplemind-preview/assets/" || (echo "Set OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH in .env before running install-plugin" && exit 1)
scripts.build-and-install: npm run build && npm run install-plugin

author: Brett Winterflood
description: Render inline previews for SimpleMind .smmx embeds.
